subject_line: ProductOS bi-weekly update: PM operating rhythm automation
summary: We clarified the scope for the next increment and formalized the schema layer for change handling and incremental delivery.
what_happened: Added formal schemas for change events, impact assessments, and increment planning.
Updated the blueprint to support change turbulence handling and SAFe-compatible incremental delivery.
Defined bi-weekly status mail as a first-class ProductOS output.
material_changes: Current scope is centered on PM operating rhythm automation before broader meeting automation.

open_issues.title: Transcript extraction quality thresholds are not yet defined in implementation detail.

decisions.statement: Treat change management and SAFe-compatible planning as core platform concerns.

next_steps.description: Define transcript extraction workflow and confidence thresholds.
Draft issue log and meeting record examples from a real PM reporting cycle.

pm_context_requested: What stakeholder concerns were most important in the last review cycle?
Which issues should be treated as watch items rather than open risks?
